Auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your account or create a new one
Auth.registrationDisabled: New account registration is currently disabled. Please contact an administrator if you need access.
Auth.verificationSent: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Please click the link to verify your account before signing in.
Auth.termsNotice: By registering, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy.
Auth.resetDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
Auth.emailSentDescription: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox.
Auth.noResetToken: No reset token was provided. Please request a new password reset link.
Auth.passwordResetSuccessMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. Redirecting you to login...

VerifyEmail.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address.
VerifyEmail.verifiedDescription: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now complete your imports.
VerifyEmail.redirecting: Redirecting you to the import page...
VerifyEmail.noTokenDescription: No verification token was provided. Please check your email for the verification link.

Explore.siteNotConfiguredDescription: This site needs a default view to display the explorer. Please configure one in the admin dashboard.
Explore.errorDescription: The explore view encountered an error. This is usually temporary.
Explore.mapLoadError: There was a problem loading the map
Explore.descShowingEvents: Showing {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}

Events.title: Events
Events.eventDescription: Detailed information about the selected event including location, dates, and additional data.
Events.eventNotFoundDescription: This event may have been deleted or you don't have permission to view it.
Events.failedToLoadDescription: There was a problem loading the event details. Please try again.
Events.draftPreview: You are viewing a draft version of this event.
Events.showingRecentEvents: Showing up to 50 most recent events

Account.changeEmailDescription: Update the email address associated with your account
Account.emailPasswordHint: Enter your password to confirm this change
Account.emailChangedSuccess: Email changed. Please check your new email for a verification link.
Account.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure
Account.dangerZoneDescription: Irreversible actions that affect your account
Account.deleteAccountDescription: Once you delete your account, public data will be transferred to the system, and private data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone after the grace period.
Account.deletionSummaryDescription: Review what will happen to your data before proceeding.
Account.confirmDeletionDescription: Enter your password to schedule account deletion.
Account.deletionScheduledDescription: Your account deletion has been scheduled.
Account.publicDataTransferDescription: {catalogs} public catalogs and {datasets} public datasets will be transferred to the system.
Account.privateDataDeleteDescription: {catalogs} private catalogs, {datasets} private datasets, and {events} events will be permanently deleted.
Account.gracePeriodDescription: You can cancel the deletion anytime within 7 days. After that, this action cannot be undone.
Account.deleteConfirmation: By clicking "Delete My Account", you acknowledge that:
Account.deletePoint1: Your private data will be permanently deleted after 7 days
Account.deletePoint2: Public data will be transferred to the system
Account.deletePoint3: This action cannot be undone after the grace period
Account.deletionScheduledFor: Your account deletion has been scheduled for {date}.
Account.deletionCancelInfo: You can cancel this deletion anytime before the scheduled date by returning to this page. After that, the deletion will be permanent.
Account.pendingDeletionMessage: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {date}{remaining}.
Account.daysRemaining: ({count, plural, one {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}})

DataExport.title: Download My Data
DataExport.description: Export all your data in a portable format
DataExport.requestedOn: Your data export was requested on {date}.
DataExport.emailWhenReady: We'll send you an email when it's ready.
DataExport.exportFailedDescription: We couldn't generate your data export. This may be a temporary issue. Please try again.
DataExport.processingTime: Processing may take a few minutes. You'll receive an email when your export is ready.
DataExport.downloadExpiry: Download links are available for 7 days after generation.
DataExport.requestError: Failed to request export. Please try again.

Import.errorDescription: The import wizard encountered an error. Your uploaded data is safe -- try again or start over.
Import.verifyEmailDescription: Please check your inbox and click the verification link to continue.
Import.verifyEmailHint: Haven't received the email? Check your spam folder or request a new verification link.
Import.signInDescription: Create an account or sign in to import your data.
Import.uploadDescription: Upload a file or fetch data from a URL containing your event data.
Import.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop your file here
Import.supportedFormats: Supported formats: CSV, XLS, XLSX, ODS
Import.dataUrlDescription: Enter a URL that returns CSV, Excel, or ODS data. You can set up automatic scheduled imports after review.
Import.selectDestinationDescription: Choose where to import your data.
Import.createCatalogPrompt: Create a catalog to organize your data
Import.mapFieldsDescription: Tell us which columns contain your event data.
Import.fieldsMappedAutomatically: Fields mapped automatically from column names
Import.sheetsDetected: {count} sheets detected. Configure mapping for each sheet.
Import.requiredFieldsDescription: These fields are required for all events
Import.locationRequired: Please select either a location field or both latitude and longitude.
Import.enableGeocodingDescription: Convert addresses to coordinates for map display.
Import.optionalFieldsDescription: Additional fields to enrich your events
Import.noDataAvailable: No data available. Please go back and upload a file.
Import.previewDescription: Sample of your data with the current mapping
Import.reviewDescription: Confirm your settings before starting the import.
Import.schemaChangeHandlingDescription: How to handle schema changes when the source data structure changes.
Import.importCompleteDescription: Your data has been successfully imported.
Import.importFailedDescription: There was an error importing your data.
Import.importingDataDescription: Please wait while we process your file.
Import.processingInfo: This may take a few minutes depending on the size of your file.
Import.processingInfoLeave: You can leave this page — we'll notify you when it's done.
Import.identityAndDuplicatesDescription: How to identify and handle duplicate events
Import.idHybridDescription: Use source ID if available, otherwise compute
Import.dedupSkipDuplicatesDescription: Don't import events that already exist
Import.dedupUpdateExistingDescription: Update existing events with new data
Import.dedupCreateVersionsDescription: Keep both old and new versions
Import.idStrategyLocked: ID strategy is locked for existing datasets
Import.flowTransformsDragHint: Drag a transform onto the canvas to add data processing
Import.flowTransformRenameDescription: Change the name of a field
Import.flowTransformDateParseDescription: Parse date strings into a standardized format
Import.flowTransformStringOpDescription: Apply string operations like uppercase, lowercase, or replace
Import.flowTransformConcatenateDescription: Join multiple fields together with a separator
Import.flowTransformSplitDescription: Split a field into multiple fields using a delimiter
Import.noPreviewYet: Map some fields to see a preview
Import.dataTransformsDescription: Transform source data before mapping to target fields
Import.noTransformsConfigured: No transforms configured. Add a transform to process your data.

Schedules.title: Scheduled Imports
Schedules.description: Manage your automatic data imports from URLs
Schedules.noSchedulesDescription: Create a scheduled import by importing data from a URL in the import wizard.
Schedules.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled import?

Scrapers.title: Scrapers
Scrapers.description: Manage your web scraper repositories and runs
Scrapers.featureDisabled: The scrapers feature is currently disabled. Contact an administrator to enable it.
Scrapers.noReposDescription: Create a scraper repo from the admin dashboard to start scraping data.
Scrapers.confirmDeleteRepo: Are you sure you want to delete this scraper repo and all its scrapers?

NotFound.title: Off the Map
NotFound.description: This location doesn't appear on any of our charts. The page you're looking for has ventured into uncharted territory.
